Metadata bit0 marks the neutral lookup entry used for k = 0.
Set control bit for the no-op path when the lookup point is infinity.
Neutral table entry keeps the original accumulator X.

notes: This file is an exact hierarchical-to-flat replay of the checked-in leaf over the checked-in retained-window scaffold.
It is still a kickmix-ISA artifact, not a primitive-gate flattening of the full Shor period-finding stack.
The signed folded lookup contract is recorded as the lookup boundary for these retained leaf calls.
